products.name: Metal to Composite Front Fairing
products.descriptor: Composite replacement front fairing for locomotives, converted from metal

evidence.snippet:
###### Metal to Composite Front Fairing
PCI’s customer in Florida has had numerous field incidents of their locomotives colliding with pedestrian vehicles. It was very costly to replace the front fairing as it shipped from Europe and was fairly complex to manufacture…
*   [Read More](/metallic-to-composite-front-fairing/)

products.name: EV Semi Truck Composite Fairing
products.descriptor: Large one-piece vacuum-infused composite roof fairing for EV semi trucks

evidence.snippet:
###### EV Semi Truck Composite Fairing
An EV OEM worked with PCI engineering to develop a large 1 piece assembly composite roof fairing. The structure was made by Vacuum Infusion. The challenge was locating the internal support structure over a large part within.
*   [Read More](/ev-semi-truck-composite-fairing/)

products.name: Fiberglass Composite Covers & Enclosures
products.descriptor: Molded fiberglass composite covers and enclosures with Class A finish for equipment

evidence.snippet: Fiberglass composite covers are ideal for medical equipment because it can be molded to complex aesthetic shapes, has great structural strength, is lightweight, durable and has a class A exterior finish for superior cosmetics and ease of cleaning. Panels can also be tailored for noise abatement or UL-94 Fire Retardance specifications.

products.notes: Dedicated page (performancecomposites.com/covers-enclosures) was skipped_class_budget. Description drawn from medical-security page which details fiberglass composite covers.

unresolved_questions: All 8 prioritized products recorded. However, the dedicated product/project pages for High Performance Drone Box, Vacuum Infused Composite Battery Tray, Metal to Composite Front Fairing, and EV Semi Truck Composite Fairing were all skipped_class_budget — richer detail (materials specs, customer, quantities, NDAA language) may exist on those pages.
The Composite Tooling Design & Fabrication capability page and Covers & Enclosures page were also skipped_class_budget, so tooling sub-services and cover/enclosure variants may be underspecified.

The Manufacturing Processes page (performancecomposites.com/manufacturing-processes-advanced-composite-parts) was skipped; it may contain additional named product lines or process offerings not captured here.
